categories.app_accessibility_desc: Checks how the app is shared and distributed
categories.multimedia_desc: Checks for the presence and configuration of audio and video features
categories.play_store_presence_desc: Checks the find-ability and attractiveness of the Play Store listing
categories.scripture_text_content_desc: Checks for the presence, completeness and features of Scripture text content
categories.supplementary_materials_desc: Evaluate the presence and quality of supplementary materials (ex. glossary, illustrations, reading plan, etc)
categories.thinking_beyond_desc: Checks for availability outside just the standard app
categories.user_engagement_desc: Checks for user engagement and feedback features
categories.user_experience_desc: Checks for enhanced app features like menus, keyboard, and graphics

details.clickable_references_details: Clickable references check not implemented yet
details.multilingual_scripts_details: Multilingual scripts check not implemented yet
details.reading_plan_details: Reading plan check not implemented yet
details.red_letter_text_details: No Red Letter (words of Jesus) option available
details.study_bible_material_details: Study Bible material check not implemented yet
details.topical_index_details: Topical index check not implemented yet
details.no_book_files_found: No book files found in project data
details.clickable_references_missing: Cross-reference links were not found in enough book files
details.clickable_references_coverage: Found cross-reference link markers in %d of %d standard Bible book files (%s%%)
details.audio_missing: No standard Bible book audio found
details.audio_some_books: Found audio in %d standard Bible books
details.audio_all_nt: Found audio for the full New Testament (%d books)
details.audio_all_standard: Found audio for the full standard Bible (%d OT/NT books)
details.audio_glossary: Found standard Bible audio in %d books plus glossary audio
details.audio_style_missing: No audio found for audio style detection
details.audio_style_single_voice: Audio found, with no local multi-voice or dramatized evidence
details.audio_style_dramatized: Detected multi-voice or dramatized audio evidence
details.about_box_information_missing: About box is missing enabled copyright/contact/version information
details.about_box_information_found: About box is enabled and includes copyright plus contact or version information
details.about_box_vernacular_missing: About box does not contain substantial vernacular or regional-language text
details.about_box_vernacular_found: About box contains substantial vernacular or regional-language text (%d non-ASCII letters)
details.analytics_missing: No enabled analytics provider or Firebase analytics feature found
details.contact_details_missing: No follow-up contact details found in about, menu, footer, or project content
details.contents_menu_missing: No contents/book/language navigation menu evidence found
details.customized_graphics_missing: No custom splash, drawer, launcher, background, or icon graphics found
details.customized_graphics_found: Found %d custom splash, drawer, launcher, or background graphics
details.further_info_link_missing: No user-facing non-media further-information link found
details.glossary_standalone: Found standalone glossary material in %d glossary book files
details.glossary_linked: Found %d glossary book files and glossary links in %d scripture book files, but no glossary illustrations found
details.glossary_linked_with_illustrations: Found %d glossary book files, glossary links in %d scripture book files, and glossary illustrations in %d glossary book files
details.illustrations_missing: No illustration images or figure markers found
details.illustrations_found: Found %d black-and-white lineart illustration image files and figure markers in %d book files
details.illustrations_color_found: Found %d color illustration images out of %d illustration image files, plus figure markers in %d book files
details.keyboard_missing: No vernacular keyboard or input-button evidence found
details.menu_navigation_regional: Found localized navigation/menu translations in regional languages (%d translations)
details.menu_navigation_vernacular: Found localized navigation/menu translations in local vernacular (%d translations)
details.multilingual_scripts_none: No additional scripture scripts or languages detected
details.multilingual_scripts_additional_scripts: Detected %d scripts for the primary language across %d book collections
details.multilingual_scripts_regional_language: Detected %d scripture languages across %d book collections
details.multilingual_scripts_back_translation: Detected parallel/back translation evidence across %d book collections
details.reading_plan_missing: No valid reading plan files found
details.red_letter_feature_missing: No show-red-letters feature found in the app definition
details.red_letter_markers_missing: show-red-letters feature is present, but no words-of-Jesus markers were found in NT book files
details.study_bible_material_missing: No study Bible material markers found
details.study_bible_material_found: Found study Bible material markers in %d book files
details.style_adjustments_missing: No project-specific style, font, color, or layout adjustments found
details.style_adjustments_found: Found project-specific style/font adjustments (%d styles, %d fonts)
details.text_changes_missing: No app-specific text enhancement changes found
details.text_changes_found: Found app-specific text enhancement changes among %d configured changes
details.text_feedback_missing: No text editor plus feedback-by-email evidence found
details.text_feedback_found: Found text editor enabled with follow-up contact evidence
details.timing_coverage: Found timing files for %d of %d audio entries (%s%%)
details.topical_index_missing: No topical index book files found
details.topical_index_found: Found topical index material in %d topical index book files
details.video_luke_jesus_film: Found %d Jesus Film video links in Luke
details.video_other_gospels: Found %d Jesus Film video links in Luke and %d in other gospels
details.video_other_links: Found %d Jesus Film video links in Luke, %d in other gospels, and %d other video links

Found %d NT books and %d OT books in appdef. Unrecognized:
%s

All 27 NT books found in appdef, without OT books. Unrecognized:

details.all_nt_plus_other:
All 27 NT books found in appdef, plus %d OT books, %d miscellaneous books, and %d unrecognized books:

All OT and NT books found in appdef, plus %d miscellaneous books and %d unrecognized books:

details.red_letter_available: Red Letter (words of Jesus) option available in %d NT book files

line_items.about_box_in_vernacular_desc: About box information in vernacular language (not just English) (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.about_box_information_desc: Appropriate information in About... box copyright, etc. (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.app_description_desc: Helpful description of App and good range of searchable key words (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.audio_desc: Checks for the presence and extent of audio (0=No audio, 1=Some books, 2=Full NT, 3=Full OT/NT, 4=Glossary audio)
line_items.clickable_references_desc: Check if cross-references and parallel passages are linked to text
line_items.contact_details_desc: Contact details for follow-up like phone, email or website (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.content_presence_desc: Check if Scripture text content is present in the build output (NT, OT, Misc, and unrecognized books)
line_items.customized_graphics_desc: Customized splash screen, drawer, interface icon (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.dbl_text_desc: Text in DBL available for other Paratext users (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.demo_video_desc: Demo video in PlayStore on how to use features (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.glossary_desc: Check for presence and quality of glossary
line_items.illustrations_desc: Check for presence and quality of illustrations
line_items.keyboard_desc: Keyboard for search/notes (0=No vernacular, 1=Vernacular buttons, 2=Embedded Keyman, 3=Predictive)
line_items.multilingual_scripts_desc: Check for presence of text in additional scripts or languages
line_items.play_store_publishing_desc: Published on Google PlayStore (0=No, 1=Local account, 2=SIL/Kalaam media)
line_items.reading_plan_desc: Check for presence of daily reading plan
line_items.red_letter_text_desc: Check for presence of red letter text in NT books
line_items.study_bible_material_desc: Check for presence of study Bible material (ex. notes, maps, charts, etc)
line_items.style_adjustments_desc: Appropriate adjustments to Styles to improve app (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.synchronized_highlighting_desc: Checks for highlighting of verses with audio (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.text_changes_desc: Appropriate changes made to underlying text (0=No, 1=Enhancements defined)
line_items.text_feedback_desc: Text editable for feedback by email (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.topical_index_desc: Check for presence of topical index
line_items.video_desc: Checks video links/clips presence (0=No, 1=Jesus Film Luke, 2=captions not locally gradable, 3=other gospels, 4=other links)
line_items.web_site_text_desc: Text available through web site (0=None, 1=Online, 2=Online with synchronized audio)
